hbcb5c39eg48b6g4bf5g98bbg82026b9ab980: Hags really do redefine depravity, don't they?
h53d21affg5f13g4070gb449gdc95fdd0d933: A promise kept in the cruellest of ways: a loved one returned, undead.
h3adc4636gba87g41c9gae8age8dadcb546c2: This entire affair sickens me. I wish we'd had no part in it.
h79b4f55ag0152g4712gb42cg9466c1b66350: We don't always choose the roles we play. All we can do is perform them to the best of our ability.
h8df1bbeeg2e6eg4598ga4f7g853229eed8de: At least the curtain's fallen on this tragedy. The lovers' tale is quite over.
hdb123bffg81c9g4b1bgb6b5g1fcd883fb72b: Can't say I'm very enthusiastic though, about the extra you just cast.
h70737b7fg88f3g4262gbf46g2f3d4e86efb4: Hags thrive on corruption. It is simply their nature.
he69c3491gcf7bg4f29g8b05gded40584e7dd: A nature that, as far as I'm concerned, deserves to go extinct.
h9281bafeg4cc0g4925g82bdga533b7ed799b: As extinct as the happiness Ethel cut out of Mayrina.
hee4620ebg85f0g4785gb912ga200921f5c07: As does that abhorrent thing-once-man. For gods' sake let his eternal sleep be free of this undead nightmare.
ha2bf10fdg13d6g4624g9a2bg3f6bfbcba36c: As does that abhorrent thing-once-man. For gods' sake let his eternal sleep be free of this undead nightmare.
hefd486fag2868g4d96g8cd8g1488abfad675: You have to admit Auntie Ethel knows how to have some fun.
h8d8aa6edg8b0ag4cc3gb3c4g644c1273b53c: In any case, the man's dead for good. The spectacle has come to a close. Fun's over.
